seoTitle: Injune vs Innes Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Injune and Innes Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Injune vs Innes Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Injune and Innes Park.
heading: Injune vs Innes Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Injune, Queensland and Innes Park, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Injune has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Innes Park (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Injune or Innes Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Injune has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Innes Park scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Injune scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Innes Park scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Injune or Innes Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Injune has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
